title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Snapdeal - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Snapdeal - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Snapdeal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Snapdeal:
Snapdeal is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal!
